mapper.select: SELECT table_id, display_id, base_id, capacity, physical_capacity, status, table_type, actual_seats, current_group_id, is_split, sub_table_suffix, main_table_id, start_time, end_time, merged_with, reserved_time, group_with, current_reservation_id FROM restaurant_tables ORDER BY base_id, display_id

SELECT table_id, display_id, base_id, capacity, physical_capacity, status, table_type, actual_seats, current_group_id, is_split, sub_table_suffix, main_table_id, start_time, end_time, merged_with, reserved_time, group_with, current_reservation_id FROM restaurant_tables WHERE table_id = #{id}

SELECT table_id, display_id, base_id, capacity, physical_capacity, status, table_type, actual_seats, current_group_id, is_split, sub_table_suffix, main_table_id, start_time, end_time, merged_with, reserved_time, group_with, current_reservation_id FROM restaurant_tables WHERE display_id = #{displayId}

SELECT table_id, display_id, base_id, capacity, physical_capacity, status, table_type, actual_seats, current_group_id, is_split, sub_table_suffix, main_table_id, start_time, end_time, merged_with FROM restaurant_tables WHERE main_table_id = #{mainTableId}

SELECT table_id, display_id, base_id, capacity, physical_capacity, status, table_type, actual_seats, current_group_id, is_split, sub_table_suffix, main_table_id, start_time, end_time, merged_with FROM restaurant_tables WHERE status = 'VACANT' AND capacity = #{capacity} AND table_type = 'MAIN' ORDER BY base_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO restaurant_tables ( display_id, base_id, capacity, physical_capacity, status, table_type, actual_seats, current_group_id, is_split, sub_table_suffix, main_table_id, start_time, end_time, merged_with, reserved_time, group_with ) VALUES ( #{displayId}, #{baseId}, #{capacity}, #{physicalCapacity}, #{status}, #{tableType}, #{actualSeats}, #{currentGroupId}, #{split}, #{subTableSuffix}, #{mainTableId}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{mergedWith}, #{reservedTime}, #{groupWith} )
mapper.update: UPDATE restaurant_tables SET display_id = #{displayId}, base_id = #{baseId}, capacity = #{capacity}, physical_capacity = #{physicalCapacity}, status = #{status}, table_type = #{tableType}, actual_seats = #{actualSeats}, current_group_id = #{currentGroupId}, is_split = #{split}, sub_table_suffix = #{subTableSuffix}, main_table_id = #{mainTableId}, start_time = #{startTime}, end_time = #{endTime}, merged_with = #{mergedWith}, reserved_time = #{reservedTime}, group_with = #{groupWith} WHERE table_id = #{table_id}

UPDATE restaurant_tables SET status = #{status}, current_group_id = #{currentGroupId}, actual_seats = #{actualSeats}, start_time = #{startTime}, end_time = CASE WHEN #{status} = 'VACANT' THEN NULL ELSE end_time END WHERE table_id = #{tableId}
UPDATE restaurant_tables SET is_split = #{isSplit}, status = 'SPLITTING', current_group_id = NULL WHERE table_id = #{tableId}

-- 更新主桌 UPDATE restaurant_tables SET status = 'OCCUPIED', table_type = 'MERGED', merged_with = #{mergedWith1}, current_group_id = #{groupId}, actual_seats = #{actualSeats1}, start_time = NOW() WHERE table_id = #{mainTableId};
-- 更新伙伴桌 UPDATE restaurant_tables SET status = 'OCCUPIED', table_type = 'MERGED', merged_with = #{mergedWith2}, current_group_id = #{groupId}, actual_seats = #{actualSeats2}, start_time = NOW() WHERE table_id = #{partnerTableId}

UPDATE restaurant_tables SET merged_with = NULL, table_type = 'MAIN', status = 'VACANT', current_group_id = NULL, current_reservation_id = NULL, start_time = NULL, end_time = NULL, actual_seats = 0 WHERE table_id IN (#{tableId1}, #{tableId2})
UPDATE restaurant_tables SET status = 'SPLITTING', is_split = TRUE, current_group_id = NULL, actual_seats = 0, start_time = NULL, end_time = NULL WHERE table_id = #{mainTableId}
UPDATE customer_groups SET table_id = #{tableId}, is_assigned = TRUE WHERE group_id = #{groupId}

UPDATE restaurant_tables SET status = #{status}, is_split = #{isSplit}, current_group_id = NULL, actual_seats = 0, start_time = NULL, end_time = NULL, merged_with = NULL, table_type = 'MAIN' WHERE table_id = #{tableId}

UPDATE restaurant_tables SET status = 'OCCUPIED', table_type = 'MERGED', merged_with = #{mergedWith}, current_group_id = #{groupId}, actual_seats = #{actualSeats}, start_time = NOW() WHERE table_id = #{tableId}

UPDATE restaurant_tables SET status = 'OCCUPIED', table_type = 'MERGED', merged_with = #{mergedWith}, current_group_id = #{groupId}, actual_seats = #{actualSeats}, start_time = NOW() WHERE table_id = #{tableId}

UPDATE restaurant_tables SET status = #{status}, current_group_id = #{currentGroupId}, actual_seats = #{actualSeats}, start_time = #{startTime}, reserved_time = NULL,
current_reservation_id = #{reservationId} WHERE table_id = #{tableId}

UPDATE restaurant_tables SET status = #{status}, current_group_id = #{currentGroupId}, actual_seats = #{actualSeats}, start_time = NOW(), reserved_time = NULL,
current_reservation_id = #{reservationId} WHERE table_id = #{tableId}
UPDATE restaurant_tables SET merged_with = #{mergedWith}, table_type = 'MERGED', status = 'OCCUPIED' WHERE table_id = #{tableId}

UPDATE restaurant_tables SET status = 'VACANT', -- 状态改空闲 table_type = CASE WHEN table_type IN ('MERGED', 'GROUPED') THEN 'MAIN' ELSE table_type END, -- 合并/聚餐改回主桌 reserved_time = NULL, -- 清空预约锁定时间 current_reservation_id = NULL, -- 清空关联预约ID merged_with = CASE WHEN table_type = 'MERGED' THEN NULL ELSE merged_with END, -- 清空合并关系 group_with = CASE WHEN table_type = 'GROUPED' THEN NULL ELSE group_with END, -- 清空聚餐关系 current_group_id = NULL, -- 清空顾客组 actual_seats = 0 -- 清空入座人数 WHERE table_id = #{tableId}

UPDATE restaurant_tables SET group_with = NULL, table_type = 'MAIN', status = 'VACANT', current_group_id = NULL, current_reservation_id = NULL, start_time = NULL, end_time = NULL, actual_seats = 0 WHERE table_id = #{tableId}
